payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Close-up of the left edge of a silver metal picture frame with a decorative triangular corner cap and narrow reflective profile; glass-covered artwork (blue and tan) is visible inside and the frame is partial/edge-cropped (approx. 0.5 m from camera).

message.content: {"label":"picture frame","short_description":"silver metal picture frame edge","long_description":"Close-up of the left edge of a silver metal picture frame with a decorative triangular corner cap and narrow reflective profile; glass-covered artwork (blue and tan) is visible inside and the frame is partial/edge-cropped (approx. 0.5 m from camera).","attributes":["silver finish","metal frame","decorative triangular corner","reflective surface","narrow profile","glass covering","inner artwork visible","left-edge cropped","partial/edge-cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.5}
